nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2032; const int b = 2100; const int c = 2118; const int d = 2130; const int e = 2141; const int f = 2150; const int g = 2158; const int h = 2166; const int i = 2173; const int j = 2181; const int k = 2188; const int l = 2195; const int m = 2203; const int n = 2210; const int o = 2219; const int p = 2228; const int q = 2238; const int r = 2251; const int s = 2268; const int t = 2336;
